home.title: Streetwear that is not made for everyone.
home.subtitle: Curated Sukajan, bomber, hoodie and jacket pieces with Japanese and Korean influence. Every order is personally confirmed.
home.introTitle: Find the piece that feels like you
home.introBody: random.phitruong connects you with hard-to-find streetwear and supports sizing, color selection and a transparent order process.
home.processBody: Confirm product, size and color with the shop. Pay a 50% deposit, then the remaining 50% by COD in Vietnam.
home.socialBody: Lookbooks, arrivals and seasonal orders are updated on Instagram and TikTok.

shop.title: Streetwear order
shop.subtitle: Distinct silhouettes curated for each season.

product.orderNotice: Made to order - delivery in 7-10 days
product.changeWarning: Size and color cannot be changed after confirmation.
product.selectOptions: Please select a size and color.
product.internationalBody: Orders to Korea, Taiwan or Japan are handled through Zalo so shipping fees and customs details can be confirmed directly.

checkout.title: Confirm your order
checkout.deposit: 50% deposit via BIDV / Zalo, remaining 50% COD
checkout.successBody: The shop will review and confirm your order. Your order number is:
checkout.bankInstruction: Use the order number as the transfer reference. Send a screenshot through Zalo or Instagram for confirmation.
checkout.internationalCustoms: International orders require valid customs information (ID, passport or residence card depending on country). Shipping is quoted separately.
checkout.warning: Check your size carefully. International items cannot change size or color after shop confirmation.

request.title: Send the piece you are looking for
request.subtitle: Upload an inspiration image and the shop will source it and provide a quote.
request.successBody: The shop will review the item and contact you with a quote. Message Zalo for faster handling.

about.title: Random in discovery. Intentional in style.
about.body: random.phitruong is a streetwear order service for customers who want distinctive pieces with a clear, personal consultation process.
about.promiseBody: Product, size, color and price are confirmed before ordering. Progress is updated from deposit through delivery.

contact.title: Contact & support
contact.subtitle: Message the shop for availability, sizing or international order consultation.
contact.name: Your name
contact.communityPlaceholder: Community links will be available soon.

footer.description: Premium streetwear order service in Vietnam. Korea, Taiwan and Japan shipping is available through direct consultation.
